query: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM providers p JOIN provider_revision_models prm ON prm.provider_revision_id = p.active_revision_id JOIN provider_revision_capabilities prc ON prc.provider_revision_model_id = prm.id WHERE prm.source_provider_model_id = $1 AND prc.operation = $2 AND prc.surface = $3 AND prc.mode = $4 AND prm.enabled AND prc.source = 'certified' AND p.state <> 'disabled'::provider_state) AS "value!"
